decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to establish control through the use of Gates and various removal spells. By using cards like Prismatic Strands and Malevolent Rumble, the deck is able to clear the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, the deck features cards like Seeker of Skybreak and Sacred Cat for stabilization and defense. The inclusion of Outlaw Medic and Bitter Reunion provide additional utility and value. Overall, this deck aims to maintain control of the game while slowly chipping away at the opponent's resources.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly flood the board with Elves and utilize their synergy to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck is designed to generate mana quickly with cards like Priest of Titania and Llanowar Elves, while also benefiting from cards like Timberwatch Elf to pump up the team and Nyxborn Hydra for a strong finisher. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help to refill the hand and keep the pressure on, while cards like Masked Vandal provide flexibility and disruption.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on using counterspells and removal spells to control the opponent's board while drawing cards and generating card advantage. It also utilizes cheap evasive creatures like Faeries and Ninjas to pressure the opponent and provide additional card advantage. The deck includes cards like Snuff Out and Lórien Revealed to deal with threats efficiently, while also incorporating ways to recur resources like Gurmag Angler and Thorn of the Black Rose. The main goal is to outvalue the opponent and maintain control of the game until the win condition can be achieved.

The focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence with low-cost, efficient creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan with counterspells and disruptive spells. The deck leverages card draw and graveyard interaction to fuel its aggression and maintain card advantage. By efficiently deploying threats and disrupting the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to apply pressure and control the game tempo in its favor.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm and outpace the opponent with a mix of efficient creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to apply early pressure with creatures like Thraben Inspector and Lunarch Veteran, while supporting them with pump spells such as Thraben Charm and Rally the Peasants. With a versatile suite of removal in Lightning Bolt and Prismatic Strands, alongside card draw from cards like Thrilling Discovery, the deck aims to maintain a steady stream of threats and answers to close out games swiftly.

The main focus of this deck is to use various control elements and gate-related cards to disrupt the opponent's game plan while slowing down the game with creature removal and life gain. The deck aims to control the board through removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Malevolent Rumble, while also utilizing creatures like Seeker of Skybreak and Outlaw Medic for additional utility. The Gates provide mana fixing and access to different colors of mana, allowing for flexibility in casting spells. Overall, the deck looks to outlast the opponent and grind out a victory through card advantage and resource management.

This Jund aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence through sacrificing artifacts and creatures for value. By using cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Drossforge Bridge to generate mana and card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient threats like Gixian Infiltrator and Krark-Clan Shaman. The graveyard hate provided by Nihil Spellbomb helps to disrupt opposing strategies, while cards like Fanatical Offering and Makeshift Munitions provide additional ways to utilize sacrificed resources. With a mix of removal, card draw, and sacrifice synergies, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless assault.

The main focus of this mono blue aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with low-cost and evasive creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Ninja of the Deep Hours. By using counterspells and disruption like Spell Pierce and Spellstutter Sprite, the deck aims to protect its creatures and maintain tempo advantage. The inclusion of card draw with Of One Mind and Moon-Circuit Hacker helps to ensure a consistent stream of threats. Sunken City provides a potential boost in power, while Snap allows for additional tempo plays.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly generate mana and storm count to cast powerful spells like Big Score and Electric Revelation. By utilizing cards like Goblin Anarchomancer, Thornscape Familiar, and Seething Song, the goal is to combo off and overwhelm the opponent with damage and card advantage. The deck aims to efficiently ramp up and chain spells together to create a storm of spells that can quickly close out the game. It relies on explosive turns and maximizing resources to overwhelm the opponent before they can react effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing control spells like Counterspell and Dispel, while also benefiting from card advantage through cards like Mulldrifter and Lórien Revealed. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by recurring key spells with Archaeomancer and utilizing Ephemerate to gain additional value from enter the battlefield effects. The inclusion of Skred and Breath Weapon provide removal options to deal with threats on the board, while Thraben Charm and Union of the Third Path offer flexibility in dealing with different situations.

The main aim of this deck is to control the game through a combination of removal spells and defensive creatures while utilizing gates to provide mana fixing and card advantage. By using efficient removal such as Journey to Nowhere and Malevolent Rumble, along with defensive creatures like Sacred Cat and Seeker of Skybreak, this deck is able to control the board until it can establish a dominant position. Additionally, the inclusion of Tamiyo's Safekeeping and Prismatic Strands provides further protection against opponent's threats, allowing for a more strategic approach to winning the game.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful aggro strategy centered around Elves. By utilizing mana ramping cards like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania, the deck aims to quickly flood the board with creatures like Timberwatch Elf and Nyxborn Hydra. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help to refill your hand while maintaining pressure on the opponent. With a strong tribal theme and a focus on generating a high number of creatures, this deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. It includes a variety of lands to ensure mana consistency, along with creatures like Seeker of Skybreak for additional control options. The deck also features cards like Cryogen Relic and Malevolent Rumble for disruption and removal, as well as Perilous Research for card advantage. With a mix of control elements and card draw, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver opponents in a Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy artifacts onto the battlefield to take advantage of the Affinity mechanic, which reduces the cost of spells based on the number of artifacts you control. By utilizing cards like Myr Enforcer and Thoughtcast, you can flood the board with artifacts and overwhelm your opponent with a swarm of creatures. Additionally, cards like Galvanic Blast provide direct damage to finish off your opponent. The strategy is to be aggressive and quickly build a powerful board presence to take control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly generate a large number of artifact creatures and use them to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. By utilizing cards that allow for card draw and mana efficiency, the deck aims to swarm the board with creatures such as Myr Enforcer and Utrom Monitor while using cards like Galvanic Blast and Krark-Clan Shaman to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes some cards for deck thinning and graveyard interaction, providing additional utility in certain situations.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly enhance and protect your creatures with a variety of auras, allowing them to deal damage efficiently while gaining life to sustain your aggro strategy. By combining hexproof creatures with powerful aura enchantments like Rancor, Armadillo Cloak, and Ethereal Armor, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure victories before they can effectively respond. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Ancestral Mask and Gladecover Scout capitalize on the synergy between auras and creatures to create an aggressive and resilient deck.
